properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, with one foot on land and one foot on the sea You brought redemption for me I was lost and undone But thank God for Your grace Had indeed really found me and you gave to me Eye salve that I may see How great you are and what you made me to be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Full redemption I found grace in the time of judgment the stone that the builders rejected has become the chief stone of my life for He has gone to prepare a place that where He is I'll be there for all eternity

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see a world held in darkness O there is so much evil all around me But Lord with you i'm standing For I know that soon Your Kingdom will be ushered in Continue to break every kingdom in my heart Till I only be the living Word manifested

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I'm waiting with great expectation For my Lord who shall I see Soon I will be in that perfect place where there is no more time no more sorrow no more sickness and pain No more sin and temptation only peace, joy and love For all Eternity For all Eternity
